fallbackNotice: Duban saitin Quick Buy: ba a saita matakan backend ba tukuna, don haka wannan taga tana nuna tsohon tsarin placeholder.

search.placeholder: Nemi kayayyaki... (Enter ko tsaya kaɗan don nema)

footer.step1: Shigar da kalmomin nema a akwatin bincike don tace kayayyaki
footer.step2: Zaɓi bayanan kaya da yawa don ci gaba
footer.step3: Da fatan ka tabbatar bayanin kaya daidai ne
footer.step4: Kammala wannan mataki don aika/ci gaba da tsari
footer.default: Kammala wannan mataki don ci gaba
